title: Emma's Sleepy Time
synopsis: Little Emma gets ready for bed with help from Mama and Papa, creating a peaceful bedtime routine filled with love and comfort.

pages.text: Emma is sleepy. Time for bed!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks yawning in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars floating around her, gentle moonlight streaming through a window
illustration.alt: Sleepy Emma yawning with stars around her

pages.text: Mama helps Emma brush her teeth. Brush, brush, brush!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks brushing teeth with Mama in a bathroom scene rendered in soft watercolor with dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds of minty fresh air, ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette

pages.text: Papa reads Emma a story. The moon shines bright.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting on Papa's lap with a book, painted in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, gentle moonlight glowing through the window, round sleepy faces, glowing stars visible outside
illustration.alt: Papa reading to Emma by moonlight

pages.text: Emma hugs her teddy. Night night, Emma. Sweet dreams!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sleeping peacefully in bed hugging a teddy bear, soft watercolor rendering with dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds above her head, glowing stars scattered around, ethereal atmosphere with gentle moonlight, pastel palette creating a serene bedtime scene
illustration.alt: Emma sleeping peacefully with teddy bear

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: What does Emma do with her teeth?
questions.explanation: Emma brushes her teeth with Mama before bedtime!

questions.question: Who reads Emma a story?
questions.explanation: Papa reads Emma a bedtime story while the moon shines bright.

questions.question: What does Emma hug at bedtime?
questions.explanation: Emma hugs her soft teddy bear to feel safe and cozy.
